failure_class: test_infrastructure -- gamma.app session absent in test PC Chrome
status_detail: Cycle 95 cleanup A4 regression for gamma NOT EXERCISED. gamma.app forces auth for /create and /generate endpoints — Chrome auto-redirected /create/generate to /signin, and the only 'generate' hit in Network was the static signin HTML (Cloudflare-served, 200 OK, document, 10kB). Engine A4 cleanup behavior (forward POST body immediately + delayed_ES + RST_STREAM, replacing h2_hold_request=1 buffering) was NEVER exercised — no PII body POSTed past the auth gate. windows-mcp itself worked correctly (no focus-steal, all interactions successful). Same root-cause class as #641 huggingface: cookie jar lacks service session. Resolution requires user to sign in to gamma.app once in test PC Chrome, then re-dispatch. INCONCLUSIVE w.r.t. B37 regression baseline (#631) — cannot determine improvement vs regression without exercising engine path.
auth_state: expired (not logged in; gamma forces signin for /create/generate)
intercept_endpoint: POST gamma.app generate endpoint (target — never reached). Only GET /create/generate observed (signin redirect, 10kB HTML).
request_status: 200 OK on signin redirect HTML; engine intercept endpoint never reached
response_first_500_chars: not captured (only static signin HTML observed, not AI response stream)
bypass_normal_answer: n/a (no LLM response either way -- gate blocked at auth, not engine)
rst_stream_evidence: not observable -- engine A4 path never exercised because no body was POSTed past the auth gate
progress_vs_pre_cleanup: unknown -- cannot compare to B37 baseline without exercising engine path
regression_evidence: absence of evidence is not evidence of absence -- A4 effect on gamma cannot be ruled out either way; need re-test with valid gamma session
b37_baseline_comparison: INCONCLUSIVE -- B37 baseline (#631) showed 40 chunks of real LLM passthrough vs target 3-chunk warning. Current run never reached engine, so cannot determine whether fa92420 cleanup fixed B37 regression, made it worse, or had no effect.
automation_validated: windows-mcp on user's real Chrome window worked correctly (no focus-steal, all Click/Type/Shortcut/Clipboard interactions succeeded). Same lesson as #641 attempt 3.
auth_diagnosis: gamma.app /create/generate requires authenticated session. Chrome cookies lack gamma.app session token. User must sign in to gamma.app once in test PC Chrome.
errors_observed: Canvas2D: Multiple readback operations using getImageData... willReadFrequently (gamma signin page warning, unrelated)

test_infra_findings.auth_state_gating_pattern: Multiple AI services (chatgpt non-anon, huggingface, gamma) require valid OAuth/session in test PC Chrome before subagent can exercise engine intercept behavior. Test PC Chrome profile state is not currently version-controlled or pre-checked.
test_infra_findings.chatgpt_anon_exception: chatgpt has anonymous /backend-anon/f/conversation flow that bypasses auth (validated in #640 SUCCESS). Most other services lack this fallback.
test_infra_findings.windows_mcp_validated_again: Confirmed second time: windows-mcp on user's real Chrome works perfectly when prerequisites met. Use it (not CDP separate profile) for authenticated services.
test_infra_findings.recommended_runtime_fix: cowork-remote runtime should add per-service auth pre-check (HEAD or GET to canonical chat URL → check 200 vs auth-redirect status). If auth missing, return NEEDS_USER_SESSION verdict immediately rather than burn subagent dispatch budget.

recommendation_for_dev: Re-dispatch #642 (or new ID) AFTER user signs in to gamma.app in test PC Chrome
A4 regression check for gamma + whether cleanup fa92420 fixes/breaks B37 baseline (#631) — both remain OUTSTANDING
Engine team can validate A4 alternatively via direct integration test (synthetic partial-body POST + RST_STREAM scenarios) — eliminates browser auth dependency entirely for h2-framing regressions
Add 'auth_state_required' field to request envelopes; add per-service auth pre-check to cowork-remote runtime
notes: Cycle 95 A4 gamma regression INCONCLUSIVE -- gate at auth (expired session, /signin redirect). Engine codepath untested. windows-mcp validated as working. Resolution: user signin required.
